selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 兔子；vi. 猎兔
words.definition: n. any of various burrowing animals of the family Leporidae having long ears and short tails; some domesticated and raised for pets or food

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: vi. 逐渐消失, 逐渐减少
n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活
words.definition: n. a crude block of metal (lead or iron) poured from a smelting furnace

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 蒙蔽物, 窗帘；a. 盲目的, 瞎的, 不加思考的
words.definition: n. people who have severe visual impairments, considered as a group

words.translation: n. 托儿所, 苗圃, 温床
words.definition: n. a child's room for a baby

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: n. 艺术, 人文科学, 技术, 巧妙, 诡计, 美术
words.definition: n. the products of human creativity; works of art collectively

words.translation: a. 可利用的, 可获得的, 有效的
words.definition: a. obtainable or accessible and ready for use or service

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 小心, 照料, 忧虑；vi. 关心, 介意
words.definition: n. the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: n. 目录, 名单, 明细表, 布条, 条纹, 列表, 序列, 数据清单；vt. 列出, 列于表上, 记入名单内, 装布条
words.definition: n. a database containing an ordered array of items (names or topics)

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕
words.definition: n. a strong positive emotion of regard and affection

words.translation: n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售
words.definition: n. the world of commercial activity where goods and services are bought and sold

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 谢意, 感谢；vt. 谢谢, 感谢
n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个
words.definition: r. not at all or in no way

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 小刀, 匕首；vt. 切割, 伤害, 切, 戳
words.definition: n. edge tool used as a cutting instrument; has a pointed blade with a sharp edge and a handle

words.translation: n. 叶, 树叶, 花瓣, 页；vi. 生叶, 翻书页
words.definition: n. the main organ of photosynthesis and transpiration in higher plants

words.translation: n. 肉, 餐, 食物
words.definition: n. the flesh of animals (including fishes and birds and snails) used as food

words.translation: n. 鼻子, 突出部分, 嗅觉；vt. 嗅到, 探出, 用鼻子触
words.definition: n. the organ of smell and entrance to the respiratory tract; the prominent part of the face of man or other mammals

words.translation: n. 钢笔, 笔, 笔调, 笔杆子, 作家, 围栏, 栅栏, 禽畜；vt. 写, 关入栏中, 囚禁
words.definition: n. a writing implement with a point from which ink flows

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人
n. 档案, 公文箱, 文件夹, 文件, 卷宗, 锉刀；vi. 列队行进, 用锉刀做
words.definition: n. a set of related records (either written or electronic) kept together

words.translation: a. 最初的, 原始的, 有创意的；n. 原物, 原作
words.definition: s. preceding all others in time or being as first made or performed

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: n. 串联, 序列, 连续, 系列, 丛书, 套, 级数, 组
words.definition: n. similar things placed in order or happening one after another

words.translation: vi. 走向, 有某种的倾向, 易于, 照顾, 注意；vt. 照料, 护理
words.definition: v. have a tendency or disposition to do or be something; be inclined

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 火, 炉火, 电炉, 火灾, 闪光体, 炮火, 热情；vt. 点燃, 烧制, 使发光, 激动, 放枪, 解雇
words.definition: n. the event of something burning (often destructive)

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: a. 楼上的；adv. 在楼上, 向楼上, 处于更高地位
words.definition: a. on or of upper floors of a building

words.translation: interj. (非正式)哇；n. 巨大的成功, 轰动一时的成功, 十分有趣的事物
words.definition: v. impress greatly

words.translation: n. 室, 房间, 枪膛；vt. 装(弹药), 把...关在室内
words.definition: n. a natural or artificial enclosed space

words.translation: n. 网, 网状物, 罗网, 净利, 净价；a. 净的, 最终的
words.definition: n. a trap made of netting to catch fish or birds or insects

words.translation: n. 平锅, 浅盘, 盆地, 硬土层, 拍摄全景；v. 上下左右移动, 摇镜头, 淘洗, 淘金
words.definition: n. cooking utensil consisting of a wide metal vessel

words.translation: n. 鸭子；vi. 没入水中, 闪避
words.definition: n. small wild or domesticated web-footed broad-billed swimming bird usually having a depressed body and short legs

words.translation: vi. 游荡, 漫步, 徘徊, 迷路, 离题, 蜿蜒；vt. 在...漫游
words.definition: v. go via an indirect route or at no set pace

words.translation: n. 楼下；a. 楼下的
及其他, 等等
n. 费用, 旅客, 食物；vi. 进展, 进步, 经营, 过活
words.definition: n. the sum charged for riding in a public conveyance

words.translation: a. 凶猛的, 猛烈的, 热烈的, 暴躁的
words.definition: s. marked by extreme intensity of emotions or convictions; inclined to react violently; fervid

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. male cat

words.translation: n. 弓, 眼睛框；v. 用弓拉琴, 弯成弓形
words.definition: n. a knot with two loops and loose ends; used to tie shoelaces

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 格洛斯特（英国西南部的港市）；格洛斯特硬干酪（产于英国）
words.definition: n. a town in northeastern Massachusetts on Cape Ann to the northeast of Boston; the harbor has been a fishing center for centuries

words.translation: 有限的
n. 馅饼, 财富, 总额, 贪污受贿, 杂乱, 喜鹊
words.definition: n. dish baked in pastry-lined pan often with a pastry top

words.translation: n. 至高, 霸权；a. 至高的, 终极的, 极端的, 最大的
n. 法国人, 法文, 法式；a. 法国的, 法国人的, 法语的
words.definition: n. the Romance language spoken in France and in countries colonized by France

words.translation: a. 根据法律组成的公司, 公司
n. 男人, 家伙
adv. 比较久
words.definition: r. for more time

words.translation: n. 约克郡；约克王朝
words.definition: n. the English royal house (a branch of the Plantagenet line) that reigned from 1461 to 1485; its emblem was a white rose

words.translation: n. 西兰岛（丹麦最大的岛）
words.definition: n. the largest island of Denmark and the site of Copenhagen
